channel.title: Trailer on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog
channel.description: Recent content in Trailer on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog

item.title: Lego Volkswagen T1 Trailer
item.description: I got some pieces that were part of a Lego Volkswagen T1 🛒#ad but couldn’t make for the complete set (which I already owned), so I was checking what mods I could build based on it, and best one, based on the amount of pieces was this one found on Rebrickable. As I found it to be a bit sad to leave the wheel, and some other elements outside I did some minor changes:
